ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "gasoline_thousand_bbls" INTEGER /* Production or consumption of gasoline in thousand barrels */,
  "ethane_thousand_bbl_per_day" INTEGER /* Production or consumption of ethane in thousand barrels per day */,
  "propane_thousand_bbl" INTEGER /* Production or consumption of propane in thousand barrels */,
  "jet_fuel_thousand_bbl" INTEGER /* Production or consumption of jet fuel in thousand barrels */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., Gasoline, Ethane, Propane, Jet Fuel) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for secure storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., external, internal) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy_data entry checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the data quality check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted (e.g., consumption trend, pricing analysis) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding changes or reasons for the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product whose price is recorded */,
  "price_per_bbl" REAL /* Price per barrel for the product */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price became effective */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is expressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the production method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data_production_methods" (
  "energy_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data entry */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production method */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of production using the method */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the production method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_data_id", "method_id")
)
